allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''''data''''][''''message'''']\)" $AO task status --id TASK-001 --status ready --json)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\(f''''TASK-001: {json.load\(sys.stdin\)[""data""][""status""]}''''\)" $AO daemon start --autonomous --auto-run-ready true --pool-size 3 --json)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''''data'''']; print\(f''''{t[""id""]}: {t[""blocked_reason""][:80] if t.get\(""blocked_reason""\) else ""no reason""}''''\)" done)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''''data''''][''''message'''']\)" for id in TASK-017 TASK-018 TASK-019 TASK-020 TASK-021 TASK-022)
Bash(do $AO task status --id $id --status ready 2 done echo 'All tasks set to ready')

Bash(AO=~/ao-cli/target/debug/ao __NEW_LINE_c4cf2e5f2ce397a6__ $AO requirements create --json --title "Documentation & Marketing Website" --description "Build a beautiful, modern documentation and marketing website for the design system using the design system''''s own components. The site should showcase the library, provide interactive component docs with live code examples, and serve as a marketing landing page to drive adoption. Built with Next.js or Astro + our design system components." --priority must --category documentation --type product --acceptance-criterion "Landing page with hero, feature grid, component showcase, and getting started section" --acceptance-criterion "Interactive component documentation with live previews and copy-paste code snippets" --acceptance-criterion "Design tokens documentation page showing all color, spacing, and typography tokens" --acceptance-criterion "Installation guide for both npm package and shadcn registry usage" --acceptance-criterion "Dark mode toggle with smooth transition" --acceptance-criterion "Responsive design — looks great on mobile, tablet, and desktop" --acceptance-criterion "Built entirely with our own design system components \(dog-fooding\)" --acceptance-criterion "Deployed and publicly accessible")

Bash(AO=~/ao-cli/target/debug/ao __NEW_LINE_9160bf94da7b2d57__ $AO requirements create --json --title "Pre-built Blocks & Patterns Library" --description "Create a library of production-ready, pre-composed UI blocks and patterns that combine multiple design system components into complete, usable sections. These blocks should be copy-paste ready and available through the shadcn registry. Each block should be responsive, accessible, and beautifully designed — showcasing what the design system can do at its best." --priority must --category usability --type product --acceptance-criterion "Auth blocks: Login form, Sign-up form, Forgot password, OTP verification — all with validation" --acceptance-criterion "Dashboard blocks: Stats overview with charts, Activity feed, Metric cards, Sidebar navigation" --acceptance-criterion "Settings blocks: Profile settings, Account settings, Notification preferences, Billing page" --acceptance-criterion "Marketing blocks: Hero sections \(at least 3 variants\), Feature grids, Pricing tables, Testimonials" --acceptance-criterion "Data blocks: Data table with search/filter/sort/pagination, Kanban board" --acceptance-criterion "Navigation blocks: Sidebar with collapsible sections, Top nav with user menu, Mobile drawer" --acceptance-criterion "Every block is responsive \(mobile, tablet, desktop\)" --acceptance-criterion "Every block has a Storybook story and is available in the shadcn registry" --acceptance-criterion "Every block uses only design system components — no raw HTML or external UI libraries")
